const j = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...j, cpuTestResult: 'Skipped: tool requires kubectl binary not available in MCP pod. Use dedicated test runner pod instead.' } }];

const j = $input.first().json;
const summary = [
  '=== NAMESPACE CREATION (k8s-mcp: resources_create_or_update) ===',
  j.createNsResult || 'N/A',
  '\n=== DATABASE DEPLOYMENT (Quarkus MCP: deployDatabase -> n8n-test) ===',
  j.deployDbResult || 'N/A',
  '\n=== CPU STRESS TEST (Quarkus MCP: runCpuStressTest) ===',
  j.cpuTestResult || 'N/A',
  '\n=== NETWORK BANDWIDTH TEST (Quarkus MCP: runNetworkTest) ===',
  j.networkTestResult || 'N/A',
  '\n=== STORAGE BENCHMARK (Quarkus MCP: runStorageBenchmark) ===',
  j.storageTestResult || 'N/A',
  '\n=== DATABASE BENCHMARK - PostgreSQL (Quarkus MCP: runDatabaseBenchmark) ===',
  j.dbBenchResult || 'N/A',
  '\n=== CLUSTER HEALTH (Quarkus MCP: checkClusterHealth) ===',
  j.clusterHealthResult || 'N/A'
].join('\n');
return [{ json: { ...j, aggregatedOutput: summary } }];
